001package net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.mode;
002
003import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
004import org.jetbrains.annotations.Unmodifiable;
005
006import java.util.ArrayList;
007import java.util.Collections;
008import java.util.List;
009
010public class ClickModeRegistry {
011
012    private static final List<BoxItemClickMode> REGISTERED_BOX_ITEM_CLICK_MODE = new ArrayList<>();
013    private static List<BoxItemClickMode> COPIED_REGISTERED_BOX_ITEM_CLICK_MODE = Collections.emptyList();
014
015    public static @NotNull @Unmodifiable List<BoxItemClickMode> getModes() {
016        return COPIED_REGISTERED_BOX_ITEM_CLICK_MODE;
017    }
018
019    public static void register(@NotNull BoxItemClickMode mode) {
020        REGISTERED_BOX_ITEM_CLICK_MODE.add(mode);
021
022        COPIED_REGISTERED_BOX_ITEM_CLICK_MODE = List.copyOf(REGISTERED_BOX_ITEM_CLICK_MODE);
023    }
024
025    public static void unregister(@NotNull BoxItemClickMode mode) {
026        if (REGISTERED_BOX_ITEM_CLICK_MODE.remove(mode)) {
027            COPIED_REGISTERED_BOX_ITEM_CLICK_MODE = List.copyOf(REGISTERED_BOX_ITEM_CLICK_MODE);
028        }
029    }
030}
